case_title: N.R. PATEL vs. WATTS, WILLIAM et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WATTS, WILLIAM THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 106 SIXTH STREET #601, SAN FRANCISCO, CA, STAYED UNTIL DEC-03-1996, LEASE FORFEITED, PLTF WAIVES BACK RENT & DMGS IF DEFT VACATES BY 5PM ON 12-3-96. IF DEFT DOES NOT VACATE, PLTF MAY HAVE AMENDED JUDGMNT FOR BACK RENT OF $430, DAMAGES OF $12/DAY FROM 10-15-96 THRU 12-3-96 & $83 COSTS. GENERAL RELEASE OF CLAIMS SEC. DEPOSIT FORF TO PLTF. EACH SIDE BEARS OWN COSTS & FEES.
